title: N-PAMP Frame-Type Registry (assignments + reserved ranges)
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/frame_types_reserved.csv: an array of row objects. The frame_type column is EITHER a single 4-hex code point (0x0001) OR an inclusive range low-high of two 4-hex code points (0x0035-0x0036). Both forms are accepted via the oneOf on frame_type. Wrong-format code point, missing column, and empty name/description are caught here; DUPLICATE / OVERLAPPING frame_type values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

oneOf.description: Inclusive range low-high of two 4-hex code points (e.g. 0x0035-0x0036).

frame_type.description: A single 4-hex frame type OR an inclusive low-high range of two 4-hex frame types.

name.description: Frame-type name or marker such as (reserved) / (channel-specific); MUST be non-empty.
